DP.407.0000:
[0103,0000]: Hey, you saw that news
report that was on TV, right?\f
You know, “Search for the Red
GYARADOS! The mysterious appearance\r
of the furious Pokémon in a lake!”\f
That show got me to thinking.\f
I’ll bet our local lake has a Pokémon
like that in it, too!\f
So, that’s what we’re gonna do.
We’ll go find a Pokémon like that!
DP.407.0001:
[0103,0000]: Hey!
Where are you wandering off to?!\f
That mystery Pokémon on TV!
It’s calling out to me!\f
Forget about going back home!\f
DP.407.0002:
Remember what your mother said?\f
Mom: “[0103,0000]!
Don’t go into the tall grass!\f
“Remember, wild Pokémon may attack
you if you’re walking in tall grass.\f
“It would be OK if you had your
own Pokémon, but...”
DP.407.0003:
[0103,0000]: Hey, it’s those people!
Is that old guy staring at us?\f
DP.407.0004:
Professor: Hmm...\f
I heard from [0103,0000] that
you used our Pokémon?\r
Let me see them, please.\f
Hmm...
[0100,0001] and [0100,0002]...\f
...\f
Hmm...\r
I see...
That’s how it is...\f
DP.407.0005:
[0103,0000]!
I’m going back to my lab!\f
DP.407.0006:
Dawn: Um... Yes!
Professor, please wait for me!\f
DP.407.0007:
I think you should visit our lab
later.\f
OK, see you!\f
DP.407.0008:
Lucas: Uh... Yeah, of course!
Professor, wait for me!\f
DP.407.0009:
You should visit us at our lab later,
I think.\f
We’ll be seeing you!\f
DP.407.0010:
[0103,0000]: What was all that
craziness about?\f
I mean, if he was angry, he could’ve
just yelled at us, or whatever...\f
And didn’t he want their Pokémon
back...?\f
[0103,0001]...
We should go home, too...\f
DP.407.0011:
Wild Pokémon lurk in tall grass. They
can come bursting out at any time.\f
So, if you’re wanting to battle wild
Pokémon, just walk in tall grass.\f
If you want to avoid wild Pokémon,
then stay out of the tall grass.
DP.407.0012:
Hi!
I work at a Pokémon Mart.\f
Did you know that a Pokémon’s health
is measured by Hit Points (HP)?\f
If a Pokémon runs out of HP, it
faints and can’t battle anymore.\f
If a Pokémon’s HP gets low, you
should heal it with a Potion.\f
Here, let me give you a Potion as
a free sample. First one’s free!\f
It will automatically go in the
Medicine Pocket of your Bag.\f
DP.407.0013:
You can find a Pokémon Mart in cities
and most major towns.
DP.407.0014:
That ledge is one way. Jump down
for a shortcut to Twinleaf Town!
DP.407.0015:
If your Pokémon’s health--that’s its
HP--is getting low, you should go\r
home and get some rest.
DP.407.0016:
If your Pokémon’s health--that’s its
HP--is getting low, you should go\r
to a Pokémon Center!
DP.407.0019:
Trainer Tips!\f
Don’t be shy! Talk to anyone and
everyone you happen to see.\f
By talking to people, you will get
invaluable information and advice.
